name: CPWD Specifications 2019 + Works Manual 2019 + DSR 2023
regulator: Central Public Works Department, Government of India
complementary_documents: CPWD Works Manual 2019 (procedural reference for central public works)
CPWD DSR 2023 (Delhi Schedule of Rates, latest published edition)
Yardstick for Cost of Construction (per-sqm benchmark by zone)
Pamphlet of Rates (analysis of rates supplement)
scope: Central PWD works only. State PWD works follow state-specific SoRs (MPPWD, RPWD, MJP, Kerala PWD, Tamil Nadu PWD, KSR, MSR, etc.).
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that check BOQ items, item analysis and tender documents against CPWD Specifications 2019 (Vols. I & II), Works Manual 2019 procedural rules, and DSR 2023 unit-rate references. Covers item nomenclature, mandatory subhead structure, labour+material+P&T breakup for extra/substituted items, and Cost Index alignment with the current CPWD quarter.
description_hi: सीपीडब्ल्यूडी विशिष्टियाँ 2019, वर्क्स मैनुअल 2019 और डीएसआर 2023 के अनुसार बीओक्यू, दर विश्लेषण एवं निविदा दस्तावेज़ों की जाँच।

validates.item_code_format: chapter.section.item (e.g. 2.5.1 = Earthwork > Earthwork in Excavation > In ordinary soil)
validates.extra_item_breakup: Extra / substituted items must carry labour + material + P&T (Petty Tools & Plant) component-wise analysis
validates.cost_index: DSR base + current CPWD quarterly Cost Index multiplier
